title: Migraine & Headache Tracker
subtitle: 13-Week Daily Journal for Pain, Triggers, Medication & Hormones with Neurologist Visit Prep
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
Most patients walk into a neurologist's office trying to remember the last three months from memory. This 13-week tracker fixes that.

Each daily page captures peak pain (0-10), type and location, aura, associated symptoms, triggers, rescue medication, and what actually relieved the attack. Weekly Reviews surface trends. Monthly Neurologist Visit Prep pages turn three months of data into a focused conversation with your doctor.

What's inside:
- 13 weeks of daily attack logs (0-10 pain scale, type, location, aura)
- 13 weekly reviews with daily pain trend chart
- 3 Neurologist Visit Prep sheets (top triggers, plan, questions)
- Quick-reference trigger guide: food, sleep, hormonal, environment, weather, stress
- Preventive & rescue medication log with MOH (medication overuse) alert
- Personal info, medical history, allergies, primary diagnosis

For chronic migraine sufferers, tension headache patients, cluster headache fighters, and anyone whose neurologist said 'keep a headache diary.' Walk into your next appointment with evidence.
